data.body:
RELEASE 0.10.1 COMPLETE — all acceptance criteria verified:
- [x] AC1 version-lockstep on released SHA cffbe72: pyproject 0.10.1 x1, server.json 0.10.1 x2, no 0.10.0 residue.
- [x] AC2 CHANGELOG: '## [0.10.1] - 2026-07-24' section present (curated Added/Changed/Fixed/Ops).
- [x] AC3 landed on main via Gerrit change 952 (MERGED) with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1; rebased onto concurrent change c23c -> merged SHA cffbe72 on origin/main.
- [x] AC4 PyPI: curl pypi.org/pypi/nava-rebar/json -> info.version == 0.10.1.
- [x] AC5 GitHub Release v0.10.1: target=cffbe72 (=origin/main HEAD), draft=false prerelease=false, /releases/latest -> v0.10.1.
- [x] (bonus) MCP registry io.github.navapbc/rebar now serves 0.10.1.
- [x] Post-publish smoke: 'uvx --from nava-rebar==0.10.1 rebar --help' OK; imported rebar with baked build COMMIT=cffbe72 (matches released SHA).
release.yml run 30065382823: authorize/build-once/wheel_test/sdist_test/publish/github_release/mcp_registry all success. pypi deployment approval granted by JoeOakhartNava (required-reviewer gate).
